rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Next.js PagesRouter validator enforces default exports on every file under src/pages/, not just pages themselves — components inside subdirectories like board/ and error/ must also have default export","scope":"src/pages/"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"The reported file (src/utils/helpers.ts) was already fixed; the pipeline surfaced missing defaults in unrelated pages/ subdirectory files that happened to also block the build.","scope":"build"}]}
